message:
fix: rebuild system prompt each loop iteration (GAP-2.05)

System prompt was built once before the tool loop, so tool side-effects
(e.g. writing AGENTS.md) were not reflected in subsequent LLM calls.
Move the prompt construction inside the for-round loop so each iteration
picks up fresh project docs.

Also fix captureEnv tests to match commands by name rather than relying
on last-call ordering (now that gitRootOrEmpty runs per-iteration).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
